rows.content: For example, when an 'E' is used to edit the "DEFAULT" scheme,
the DEFAULT scheme's assignments are made active and then
the key assignment menu for the DEFAULT scheme is displayed.
If an 'S' is used to select "DEFAULT", then the key assignments
are made active; the key assignment menu does not get displayed.
Undesired keyboard schemes may be deleted by using the 'D'
line command next to the scheme to be deleted.
New keyboard schemes may be created by issuing the 'E <new>'
primary command on the keyboard scheme selection list, where
<new> is replaced by the name of the scheme to create.  For
example, to create a scheme named "TEST", issue the command:
